summary: Iteration 63: Sale Book Accounting Overhaul - ALL 21 backend tests PASSED, Frontend UI fully verified. Major changes: Balance = total - advance (NOT total - cash - diesel), 5 types of ledger entries created correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby warning in console for DialogContent (accessibility, non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend salebook.py _create_sale_ledger_entries creates all 5 ledger entry types correctly
Balance = total - advance (line 262) is correct - cash/diesel are truck costs, not party payments
Advance creates party nikasi entry (reduces party debt) - correct accounting
Cash creates cash nikasi entry (money going out to truck) - correct accounting
Diesel creates diesel pump jama entry (we owe pump) - correct accounting
Truck gets jama+nikasi entries (earns cash+diesel, paid via same) - correct accounting
Search filter uses $or with regex for party_name, invoice_no, rst_no, truck_no
Excel export uses openpyxl with A4 landscape and fitToWidth settings
seed_data_creation: Test entries created and cleaned up during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sale Book accounting overhaul complete. KEY CHANGES: 1) Cash paid = truck ko diya (cash nikasi), 2) Diesel paid = pump se (diesel pump jama), 3) Advance = party se mila (party nikasi - reduces debt), 4) Balance = total - advance only. Ledger entries: party jama (total), party nikasi (advance), cash nikasi (truck), diesel pump jama, truck jama+nikasi. Search filter works across party/invoice/rst/truck. Excel export returns xlsx. Old Gayatri Agro voucher (#1) uses old accounting - ignore it.

entry_types: 1. Party Ledger JAMA - Total amount (party owes us)
2. Party Ledger NIKASI - Advance received (reduces party debt)
3. Cash NIKASI - Cash going out to truck
4. Diesel Pump JAMA - We owe pump for diesel
5. Truck Ledger JAMA + NIKASI - Truck payment (cash+diesel)

verified: Cash and Diesel do NOT affect balance
Balance correctly calculated in both backend and frontend
New ledger entries created with updated amounts

delete_cleanup.verified: All 5 ledger entry types cleaned up

verified: Invoice No field at top of form
Advance field in payment section (blue border)

frontend.search_bar_present: PASSED - placeholder: 'Search: Party, Invoice No, RST, Truck...'

explanation.cash_paid: Cash given to truck driver - recorded as Cash NIKASI
explanation.diesel_paid: Diesel arranged from pump for truck - recorded as Diesel Pump JAMA
explanation.advance: Advance payment received FROM party - reduces party debt
explanation.balance: Remaining amount party owes us = Total - Advance

ledger_entries_on_sale: 1. Party JAMA (Rs.Total) - Party now owes us this amount
2. Party NIKASI (Rs.Advance) - Advance received reduces debt
3. Cash NIKASI (Rs.Cash) - Cash given out to truck
4. Diesel Pump JAMA (Rs.Diesel) - We now owe pump
5b. Truck NIKASI (Rs.Cash+Diesel) - Truck paid via cash+diesel
